author: jsign
content: I was just thinking of this -- first plan was getting on top of latest devnet-5 stuff, but maybe doesn't make much sense and we should jump directly to devnet-6. but the devnet isn't up yet afaik (https://ethpandaops.io/networks/)

author: jsign
content:
Maybe that's fine and we can still do it. No R2 bucket will be available until that.
Just feel being so in bleeding edge of unlaunched network can create a lot of noise in seeing failing things for non-zkevm related reasons/changes

author: jsign
content: Maybe the reasonable thing is wait or the network to be up and reasonably healthy, and then do a tests-zkevm@... on top of devnet-6.

author: qu0b
content: we're still waiting on some clients

author: jsign
content: makes sense. so then prob we'll wait 👍
